title: Buttery Crisp Middle Eastern Flatbread
description: A romantic Middle Eastern dish featuring crispy flatbread topped with a blend of herbs and spices, served with a side of creamy vegan butter. Perfect for a cozy evening with family and friends.
instructions: Combine flour, salt, black pepper, sugar, and yeast in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on the desired size of your flatbreads.
Roll out each piece of dough into a thin circle, about 8-10 inches in diameter.
Brush both sides of each flatbread with canola oil.
Grill the flatbreads for 1-2 minutes on each side, until they are crispy and golden brown.
Transfer the flatbreads to a serving plate and brush them with vegan butter.
Sprinkle chopped parsley, dill, and minced garlic over the flatbreads.
